description_long: This research institute is a rectangular, two-story building with a flat roof and a mix of brick and dark exterior facades. Large windows line the upper portions of the walls, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces, which include open-plan rooms, laboratories, and lecture halls. The building features a prominent main entrance with double doors and a covered awning, as well as several secondary access points. The grounds are landscaped with green lawns on multiple sides, and the structure includes a garage or loading bay area. The interior layout is visible from above, revealing partitioned rooms and communal areas. The overall design is functional and institutional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on utility.
description: A modern, rectangular research institute with brick and dark facades, large windows, and a flat roof, featuring open-plan interiors and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: This view shows the dark facade with a prominent awning over the main entrance and a garage or loading bay to the right.
description_view_1: The brick exterior is visible here, with large windows and a clear view into the open-plan interior spaces and lecture halls.
description_view_2: This side highlights the brick facade with arched windows and a large expanse of green lawn, as well as multiple rooms visible through the windows.
description_view_3: The dark facade dominates this view, with rows of windows and a clear look into the partitioned interior rooms and communal areas.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway features a wide, rectangular awning above double doors, constructed from glass and metal. The entrance is flush with the ground for accessibility, with no visible steps, and is framed by the dark facade. There are no decorative elements or signage present.
